'''鈭歴h-zh-w-n''' ('''kashazhwenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bramble|bramble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bramble|bramble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-zh-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| kashazhwenoko
|}
